case_title: A. GORDON ATKINSON VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,100.00 FILED BY ATKINSON, A. GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY ATKINSON, A. GORDON WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATKINSON, A. GORDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. $1,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,630.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
